scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function walk(d){for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d)){const p=path.join(d,f);const s=fs.statSync(p);if(s.isDirectory())walk(p);else if(p.endsWith('.js')){require('child_process').execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check',p],{stdio:'inherit'})}}} walk('js'); walk('netlify/functions'); console.log('syntax ok')"
